---
title: OPM Azure API Management Gateway Adapter (Federal HRIT) â€” Adapter Validation
  Suite
doc-type: avs
adapter-id: opm-azure-apim
adapter-class: modernization
mission-class: integration
status: reserved
phase: phase-planning
gcc-boundary: gcc-moderate
canon-source: canon/modernization-registry.yaml
derived-from: uiao/canon (sync_canon.py)
generated: '2026-05-07'
---

# OPM Azure API Management Gateway Adapter (Federal HRIT) â€” Adapter Validation Suite

::: {.callout-note}
## Canon-derived document

**Status:** `reserved` Â· **Class:** `modernization` Â· **Mission:** `integration` Â· **Phase:** `phase-planning`

**Canon source:** `canon/modernization-registry.yaml` (propagated by `uiao/tools/sync_canon.py`).

The YAML frontmatter and this banner are regenerated from canon on every sync. **Do not hand-edit.** Author new material only below the `## Overview` heading.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
## Scaffold â€” awaiting authored content

This document is a stub. Replace every `_TODO â€” ..._` block with authored content that is consistent with UIAO canon. Canon invariants (`gcc-boundary`, `ssot-mutation: never`, etc.) must never be contradicted.
:::

## Overview

_TODO â€” Author an overview of the OPM Azure API Management Gateway Adapter (Federal HRIT) adapter's role in the UIAO governance perimeter. Do not contradict canon. Cross-reference the companion ATS document where relevant._

## Scope

Target surfaces / subsystems: `oauth2-token-validation`, `api-rate-limiting`, `mtls-termination`, `payload-transformation`, `developer-portal`, `cross-agency-api-routing`

_TODO â€” Expand scope with concrete boundaries: what the adapter reads, what it emits, what it explicitly does not touch._

## Controls

NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 controls this adapter supports: `AC-4`, `AC-17`, `AU-2`, `AU-12`, `IA-2`, `IA-8`, `SC-7`, `SC-8`, `SC-13`, `SC-23`, `CA-9`

_TODO â€” For each control, state the adapter's role (primary, supporting, evidence-only). If a control is aspirational, flag as `NEW (Proposed)` per No-Hallucination Protocol._

## Operational profile

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Runtime | `python-3.12` |
| Runtime pin | `TBD` |
| Runner class | `github-hosted` |
| Tenancy | `per-customer` |
| Evidence class | `baseline` |
| Retention | `3` year(s) |

## Canon invariants

- `gcc-boundary: gcc-moderate`
- `ssot-mutation: never`
- `certificate-anchored: true`
- `object-identity-only: true`

## Notes from canon

Closes the HRIT IAM gap for the centralized OPM-hosted API gateway mandated by Solicitation 24322626R0007 Amd 4 Appendix B pp. 82, 84. Gateway is operated by OPM; the contractor configures APIs through it but does not own the gateway. The "Core-HCM API boundary" is enforced at this surface â€” the contractor's responsibility ends at APIM ingress. Adapter activation requires an OPM-issued service principal scoped to the federal-HRIT APIM instance. Tier-1 conformance: pending â€” likely requires Microsoft-attested test fixtures plus per-tenant sandbox capture. Activation requires a per-adapter ADR modeled on ADR-035.

## References

- UIAO-CANON-003
- ADR-053

---

*Generated by `uiao/tools/sync_canon.py`. See `uiao/ARCHITECTURE.md` Â§4 for the cross-repo sync contract. See `uiao-docs/_quarto.yml` for rendering configuration.*
